{{Quote|Death comes for us all. It's all I know for sure. The question isn't: are you prepared to die? The question is: who would you be when you close your eyes?|Erik Lehnsherr|Avengers: Doomsday}}
'''Erik {{Conjecture|Magnus}} Lehnsherr''' is a [[mutant]] who has the power to control electromagnetic fields, which he uses to manipulate metals, and calls himself '''Magneto'''.

==Biography==
''To be added''

==Powers and Abilities==
===Powers===
*'''Mutant Physiology''': As a [[mutant]], Erik Lehnsherr possesses unique DNA structure, different from [[humans]], which grants him superhuman abilities.

===Abilities===
''To be added''

==Relationships==
===Allies===
*[[Professor X|Charles Xavier/Professor X]] - Friend

==Trivia==
*In the comics, Erik Lehnsherr, born '''Max Eisenhardt''', is a [[mutant]] who happens to be the [[X-Men]]'s greatest adversary and the leader of the [[w:c:marvel:Brotherhood of Evil Mutants|Brotherhood of Evil Mutants]] and, at times, also a member of the X-Men.

==Behind the Scenes==
*Magneto in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the second live-action incarnation of the character, following an [[Magneto/Earth-10005|incarnation]] portrayed by [[Ian McKellen]] and {{WPS|Michael Fassbender}}.
